2\",\"dataType\":\"string\"},{\"name\":\"Address 1: City\",\"dataType\":\"string\"},{\"name\":\"Address 1: State/Province\",\"dataType\":\"string\"},{\"name\":\"Address 1: ZIP/Postal Code\",\"dataType\":\"int64\"},{\"name\":\"Address 1: Country/Region\",\"dataType\":\"string\"},{\"name\":\"Address 1: Phone\",\"dataType\":\"string\"}]}]}"}
